---
name: Refactor
about: Improve code structure, readability, or maintainability
title: "[Refactor] "
labels: refactor
assignees: ''

---

## What to refactor
Which part of the code needs refactoring?
(e.g. module, function, class, directory structure)

## Current problems
- Duplicated code
- Poor readability
- Complex logic
- Tight coupling
- Low testability
- Performance issues
- Outdated patterns

## Proposed solution
How do you plan to refactor it?

## Expected benefits
- Cleaner code structure
- Better maintainability
- Easier to test
- Improved performance
- Reduced technical debt

## Breaking changes?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, describe what will break and how to handle it.

## Additional context
Screenshots, code snippets, or references.
